Description: Validate that the new exclusion ZC 3676 (Designated Professional Services) appears as an optional exclusion and can be selected/added on the listed transaction types.
Action: 1. Navigate to a New Business policy creation screen and open the Umbrella coverages.
Expected Result: 1. ZC 3676 exclusion is listed under Umbrella exclusions and is selectable.

Action: 2. Select ZC 3676 and add it to the transaction.
Expected Result: 2. ZC 3676 is added to the transaction and visible in the coverage/exclusions list.

Action: 3. Repeat steps for a Renewal transaction.
Expected Result: 3. ZC 3676 is available and addable on Renewal transactions.

Action: 4. Repeat steps for a Policy Change transaction.
Expected Result: 4. ZC 3676 is available and addable on Policy Change transactions.

Action: 5. Repeat steps for a Rewrite transaction.
Expected Result: 5. ZC 3676 is available and addable on Rewrite transactions.

Description: Validate that when ZC 3676 is selected it is automatically attached to final policy documents with proper language-based selection, versioning and edition date.
Action: 1. On a policy where ZC 3676 has been added, complete the policy finalization/issue flow and go to the Documents/Final Policy output.
Expected Result: 1. Document for ZC 3676 is automatically attached to the final policy documents.

Action: 2. Verify the attached ZC 3676 document's version and edition date metadata.
Expected Result: 2. The attached ZC 3676 document shows the correct version and edition date as per release notes.

Action: 3. Change the policy language selection (where applicable) and finalize the policy.
Expected Result: 3. The attached ZC 3676 document corresponds to the selected language variant (language-specific document attached).

Action: 4. Verify the attachment appears in policy payload and document list for downstream systems.
Expected Result: 4. The document is included in the policy payload/listing with correct metadata (version, edition date, language).

Description: Validate the schedule box and free-text schedule rows for ZC 3676: box appears only when ZC 3676 selected, supports Add rows and free-form text up to 250 characters per row.
Action: 1. Select ZC 3676 on a policy transaction.
Expected Result: 1. A schedule section/box for ZC 3676 is displayed and an 'Add' button is present.

Action: 2. Click the 'Add' button to create a schedule row.
Expected Result: 2. A new schedule row is added and visible in the schedule grid/section.

Action: 3. Enter free-form text (up to 250 characters) into the 'Designated professional services excluded' field for the new row.
Expected Result: 3. The entered text is accepted and persists in the schedule row; input length accepted up to 250 characters.

Action: 4. Add multiple rows using the 'Add' button.
Expected Result: 4. Multiple schedule rows are created and each row allows separate free-text entries.

Description: Validate that selecting ZC 3676 without entering any schedule rows triggers the out-of-the-box validation error as specified.
Action: 1. Select ZC 3676 on a policy transaction and attempt to save/complete the transaction without adding any schedule rows.
Expected Result: 1. An OOTB validation error is displayed preventing save; user is informed that at least one schedule entry is required.

Action: 2. Verify the error message is displayed next to the schedule section (or in the validation summary).
Expected Result: 2. The OOTB error appears in the validation summary and/or inline next to the schedule section.

Action: 3. Add a valid schedule row and save the transaction.
Expected Result: 3. The validation error is cleared and the transaction saves successfully.

Description: Validate that ZC 3676 selection is available only for policies/renewals with effective dates on or after the August release live date, and not available for earlier effective dates.
Action: 1. Open or create a policy/renewal with an effective date prior to the August release live date.
Expected Result: 1. ZC 3676 exclusion is NOT present/available for selection on policies with effective dates prior to the August release live date.

Action: 2. Open or create a policy/renewal with an effective date on or after the August release live date.
Expected Result: 2. ZC 3676 exclusion is present and selectable for policies/renewals with effective dates on or after the August release live date.

Action: 3. For a renewal that moves from pre-August to post-August effective window, verify availability.
Expected Result: 3. The exclusion is available for the renewal if its new effective term falls on/after the August release date.
